# Database migrations (Alembic)

The platform uses Alembic for versioned schema migrations in production.
For local/dev with SQLite, `init_db()` (create_all) is still used on startup
for convenience.

```bash
# apply latest migrations
alembic upgrade head

# create a new autogenerated revision after changing models
alembic revision --autogenerate -m "describe change"
```

The DB URL is taken from `BUGIS_DATABASE_URL` (see `alembic/env.py`).
